title: Seiler 4 × 4 vs 4 × 8 Hybrid
description: Best of both Seiler protocols in one session
purpose: Best of both Seiler protocols in one session

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 70% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 70% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting strong. 6 reps to go. The first one sets your standard for the rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 4:00 at 112-118% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Beginning strong. 4:00 at 118%. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 4:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/6. 118% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Set the tone. Execute with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/6. 55% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 2 of 6.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/6. 4 to go. You've accumulated 4min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/6. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2/6. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 22% into session. 118% at 95-100 rpm. Stay sharp on technique.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 28% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 3:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 28% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 4:00 at 118%. You're building something here. Suffering is the price of admission.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 3/6. 118% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/6. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/6. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 3/6. 118% FTP. Keep 85-90 rpm steady. Don't let form collapse.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 3/6. 55% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 3:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 41% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 118% for 4:00. Next up: 3:00 recovery, then 8min at 110%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 41% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 41% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. 118% for 4:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 35 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 3:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 5:00. Then 31min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 5:00 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 51% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 5:00. Then 31min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 58% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 5min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 58% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 58% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 58% done. 110% for 8:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 68% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 51 minutes of work done. 18 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 68% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 18 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 110%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 8:00 at 110%. Then 10min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep! 8:00 at 110%. Leave nothing in reserve. You'll be cooling down in 10 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. 8:00 at 110%. Then 10 minutes to contemplate your life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 106-110% FTP, 90-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 86% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 32min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 86% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
